## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Anything and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and implementation for SEO growth](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX proposed a "Reclaim and Scale" content strategy with 9 topic clusters to target SEO and AI visibility](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [Anything to provide customer success stories and product details to enhance content authenticity and authority](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [GrowthX to set up performance tracking via Looker dashboard and Scrunch for AI visibility measurement](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2239.0)
  - [Anything to create drag-and-drop CTAs in Sanity CMS for strategic placement within blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2090.0)

## Topics

### Content Generation Process

  - [Atlas: GrowthX's in-house content platform with customizable pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Process: keyword research → assignment brief → research → outline → draft → fact-checking → editing](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Ability to tailor pipeline for Anything's specific needs](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Integration of customer stories and product details for authenticity](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)

### Content Strategy Overview

  - ["Reclaim and Scale" approach: recapture lost keywords, expand to new clusters](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [Positioning: AI-powered app builder for entrepreneurs, tech professionals, small agencies](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [Core differentiators: production reliability, mobile/web parity, real-world outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [Target audiences: traditional SEO and AI visibility](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)

### Topic Clusters

  - [9 proposed clusters covering various aspects of app development and AI integration](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [Clusters include: side hustle ideas, industry-specific opportunities, business models, app building guides, monetization strategies, product comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [Dhruv suggested incorporating more AI-focused content and product-building intricacies](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)

### Performance Tracking and Reporting

  - [Looker dashboard setup for analytics (GA4 and GSC integration)](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2239.0)
  - [Scrunch implementation for AI visibility measurement](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2239.0)
  - [Current domain authority score: 21 (down from 60+ with previous domain)](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)

### Content Presentation and CTAs

  - [Recommendation for multiple, strategically placed CTAs within blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2090.0)
  - [Anything to create drag-and-drop CTA blocks in Sanity CMS](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2090.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide CTA copy suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2213.0)

### Brand Positioning Considerations

  - [Balance between prosumer appeal and enterprise readiness](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2362.0)
  - [Emphasis on design quality and infrastructure robustness without alienating core audience](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2362.0)
  - [Potential for design-focused content to differentiate from competitors](https://fathom.video/share/yFGCpP8M5mJAGmuVe2gSozE7oc-9772Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2539.0)
